name: Superior Forge & Steel
message: SFS is a fully integrated alloy steel product manufacturer from scrap selection for melting through finishing. The primary productis forged and hardened rolls for hot and cold rolling of ferrousand nonferrous metals.We are ready to upload more than 22 GB of essential corporate documents such as: corporate NDA’s, medical documents, internal corporate correspondences, HR documents, contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, financial data (audits, payment details, reports), etc.
